title.cn: 创始人 & 数字体验总监

tagline.cn: 打造有灵魂的数字体验。

intro.en: I'm a Digital Experience Director who believes brand perception is designed, not accidental. With more than 15 years of experience bridging logic and aesthetics, I build digital platforms that feel as premium as the brands they represent.
intro.cn: 我是一位数字体验总监，深信品牌感知是设计出来的，而非偶然。凭借 15 年以上连接逻辑与美学的经验，我打造与品牌价值匹配的高端数字平台。

quote.en: "Design is my language. Logic is my tool."
quote.cn: "设计是我的语言，逻辑是我的工具"

desc.en: Precision, agility and team chemistry, shaped through badminton, basketball and pickleball.
desc.cn: 精准、敏捷与团队默契，在羽毛球、篮球与匹克球之间不断锤炼。

desc.en: Every destination reshapes how I observe people, behaviour, and space, and that naturally flows into how I build.
desc.cn: 每一个目的地，都拓宽了我设计的视野。

title.en: Zi Wei Dou Shu, The Art of Destiny

desc.en: I study Zi Wei Dou Shu to understand energy and flow, principles that quietly shape how I structure UX.
desc.cn: 将紫微斗数的古老智慧应用于理解能量流动, 同样的原理也引领着我的 UX 架构设计。

desc.en: Built a strong technical foundation with PHP, MySQL and WordPress, shaping how I approach systems today.
desc.cn: 精通底层架构, PHP、MySQL、WordPress。奠定了支撑我今日创作的逻辑基础。

role.cn: 房地产经理兼 IT 顾问

desc.en: Built a Property Management System from scratch, solving real operational pain points through custom software.
desc.cn: 从零打造业界闻名的物业管理系统, 用定制软件解决真实、高价值的业务痛点。

desc.en: Led programmers across full-stack delivery, architecture and integrations, translating business needs into scalable platforms across industries.
desc.cn: 带领程序团队负责全栈交付、系统架构、整合与人才培养，将业务需求转化为可扩展的平台，并推动多个项目落地。

role.cn: 创始人 & 数字体验总监

desc.en: Blending 15 years of logic with UI/UX and premium motion design to elevate brands through designed perception.
desc.cn: 将 15 年的逻辑经验与高端动效 UI/UX 融合, 通过「感官设计」提升品牌价值。

summary.en: Help local brands move away from cheap template looks.
summary.cn: 短期目标： 在未来一年，协助 20 个本土品牌告别“廉价模板感”，用国际水准的数字体验（Digital Experience）重塑品牌身价。

points.en: Short term: help 20 local brands reshape their value with international-level digital experience this year.
points.cn: 短期目标： 在未来一年，协助 20 个本土品牌告别“廉价模板感”，用国际水准的数字体验（Digital Experience）重塑品牌身价。

points.en: Long term: lead Jextures to become known for high-end custom work.
points.cn: 长期目标： 带领 Jextures 团队成为行业内“高端定制化”的代名词，用设计与架构实力提升大马企业的国际竞争力。

summary.en: Self-taught since 2011, with 15 years in web development.
summary.cn: 2011 年自学入行，深耕 15 年，现已能自如驾驭任何复杂的网站架构

points.en: Built a complex Property Management System (PMS) by myself while working as a property salesperson.
points.cn: 在房地产行业担任业务员期间，凭一己之力开发了一套复杂的物业管理系统 (PMS)

points.en: Started self-learning in 2011 and have worked in this field for 15 years.
points.cn: 2011 年自学入行，深耕 15 年，现已能自如驾驭任何复杂的网站架构

summary.en: Sports, travel, Feng Shui, and AI.
Proptech, education, I-Kuan Tao, and Feng Shui networks.
summary.cn: Malaysia Proptech Association (马来西亚房地产科技协会) 成员。

points.cn: Malaysia Proptech Association (马来西亚房地产科技协会) 成员

points.en: Feng Shui masters from different schools
The art of balancing logic, design, and code

desc.en: I specialise in digital experience, partnering with clients across:
desc.cn: 我专注于数字体验, 以下是我的合作伙伴：

trigger.en: "Our website looks outdated... it doesn't match our quality."
trigger.cn: "我们的网站看起来很过时，配不上我们的产品质量..."

cue.en: That's your cue. That's when you introduce Alex Khoo.
cue.cn: 当你听到这句话，那正是推荐 Alex Khoo 的最佳时机。

main.en:
Beauty is the baseline.
Usability is the benchmark.
main.cn:
好看只是基础
好用才是标准

sub.en: Brand perception is intentional, not incidental.
sub.cn: 品牌感知是设计出来的，而非偶然。

desc.en: Book a 121 (one-to-one) with Alex Khoo for a focused conversation about your brand's digital future.
desc.cn: 预约与 Alex 的一对一 (121) 会谈, 专注探讨你的品牌数字未来。
